overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge at night. The camera faces forward over the bow with three navigation monitors displaying chart, radar, and sonar data while the ship moves steadily through the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station overlooking bow

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring navigation displays while moving forward through the waterway

entered.detail: leftmost screen showing nautical chart with green landmasses and blue water
center screen displaying circular radar with rotating yellow sweep arm
rightmost screen showing blue depth sounder profile
forward deck structure of the vessel with red deck plating and white railings
metal railings on the bridge wings framing the forward view

segments.scene_description: View from inside a ship's bridge at night, looking forward over the bow. Three navigation monitors display chart, radar, and sonar data. The vessel moves steadily through dark water, with the radar sweep rotating continuously and white wake visible along the hull. The scene remains consistent throughout the clip with steady forward motion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, forward-facing perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark nocturnal seascape. It begins with a view over the bow, where three navigation monitors provide a constant stream of chart, radar, and sonar data. As the vessel pushes forward, the rotating sweep of the radar continues its rhythmic cycle against the backdrop of the night. The scene remains focused on this consistent motion, tracking the white wake as it churns along the hull through the deep, dark water.
